content:
Fail a Mastery Exam?
Receives a status effect. Redemption paths available.


✅ Why This Works:
• Ties difficulty into literary themes.
• Stacked rewards encourage continued participation.
• Failure comes with consequences but allows redemption.

🔄 4. Redemption Paths for Failed Mastery Exams

📜 If a student fails a mastery exam, they can restore XP and remove their status effect through a skill-based challenge.
✔ Performance-based or applied literary knowledge task.
✔ Tied to literary archetypes (e.g., a Monologue Performance to escape Dante’s Inferno).
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 87 (chunk 87/555)
